uiSubtitle: Browse by need. Select a test to see a simple Why/How and the lab location.
mapSub: Zoom & pan to explore lab locations
detailSub: Select a test to see Why / How and where it is performed
labsIntro: Here you will place a photo and a short text for each lab. The top map is always available and can be expanded.
labsHint: Tip: when you select a test, the map and cards highlight the labs used for that test.
labOverviewSub: The plant where the laboratory is located.
labTestsSummary: In {lab}, we perform a total of {count} tests.
labTestsTopLabSelf: This is the laboratory with the highest number of tests.
labTestsTopLabOther: The laboratory with the most tests is {lab} with {count}.
labChartCategoryTitle: Tests by category in this Lab
labChartStandardTitle: Tests by standard in this Lab
emptySub: Use the left panel to browse categories or search by keyword.
searchEmptySub: Try a different keyword or clear the search.
featureValidationSub: Certified testing focused on safety. Our enclosures are tested to the most rigorous standards across Europe, North America, and worldwide.
featureSelectionSub: Find the right test for your needs. A wide range of tests is performed to ensure any issue does not compromise the enclosure’s proper functionality.
featureNetworkSub: Our teams work in close collaboration across our laboratories to deliver the highest quality for our customers.
overviewSub: General distribution of tests across categories, standards and laboratories.
overviewIntro: Visual summary in three charts synthesizing testing activity across the three laboratories: Capellades, Molins de Rei, and Sarre-Union (Sarel). The results can be viewed by category, by applicable standard, and by the laboratory where each test is performed. The charts can also be switched to a percentage view to better understand the share represented by each category.
videoProceduresPlaceholder: Select a procedure to load the video.
templatesNote: These files are Word macro-enabled templates (.dotm). Download and open in Microsoft Word.
templatesStep1: Step 1 – Download the file and click the blue folder icon “Show in folder” to locate the template.
templatesStep2: Step 2 – Right-click the file → Properties → in the General tab, check Unblock (not in the Security tab).
templatesStep3: Step 3 – Click Apply, then OK. The template is ready to use.
templatesPS: P.S. You only need to do this once. You can save a copy on your desktop to keep the original file intact.
standardsNote: Official technical standards (PDF). For internal use only.
